title: SIR Trading - Rekt
relevance_summary: Transient storage collision in uniswapV3SwapCallback function allowing attacker to bypass security checks

prevention.rule: Block any tx that writes to the same transient storage slot used for security checks

summary: SIR Trading was hacked due to a transient storage collision vulnerability in the uniswapV3SwapCallback function, allowing attackers to bypass security checks. A guard could have blocked transactions writing to the same transient storage slot used for security checks.
